statement: In every magma, Equation 728 (`x = y * (y * ((z * y) * y))`) implies Equation 3265 (`x * x = x * (y * (z * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0948
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op y (op (op z y) y)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x x) = (op x (op y (op z y)))
